hero.title: Hapi.Cakes
hero.kicker: Lovingly made for your sweetest celebrations
hero.subtitle: From soft birthday florals to elegant wedding centerpieces, Hapi.Cakes creates custom cakes that feel romantic, polished, and made just for your sweetest celebration.
hero.signatureStyleText: Delicate florals, pastel palettes, and bakery-fresh elegance.

featured.title: Featured Today
featured.subtitle: A curated edit of our most-loved celebration cakes, chosen for their soft finishes, romantic styling, and premium feel.
featured.cardDescription: A premium custom cake designed to feel soft, celebratory, and beautifully memorable.

categories.title: Special Events & Occasions
categories.subtitle: Browse our signature styles by occasion and discover the visual mood that fits your sweetest celebration.
categories.description: Explore cakes styled for {{name}} with soft palettes, romantic details, and boutique presentation.

why.title: Designed for Celebrations That Deserve More Than a Standard Cake
why.subtitle: Hapi.Cakes combines premium styling, cozy romance, and custom details so each celebration feels polished, personal, and camera-ready.

refined.title: Refined custom styling
refined.body: Every cake is designed with a boutique editorial eye, from color harmony to finishing details.

celebration.title: Celebration-first approach
celebration.body: We create pieces that don’t just taste lovely, but elevate the table and the memory around it.

aesthetic.title: Soft premium aesthetic
aesthetic.body: Pastel palettes, floral details, and polished textures inspired by modern Korean and Japanese cafe culture.

service.title: Warm, personal service
service.body: The process stays collaborative and thoughtful, so your order feels special from inquiry to delivery.

process.title: A Custom Cake Process That Feels Easy, Personal, and Premium
process.subtitle: From your first inspiration to the final reveal, every step is designed to make ordering feel calm, collaborative, and beautifully tailored.

share.title: Share your inspiration
share.body: Tell us your celebration, palette, mood, and references so we can shape a cake that feels truly personal.

refine.title: Refine the sweet details
refine.body: We align on size, flavor, styling direction, and finishing touches to create a design that feels polished and thoughtful.

celebrate.title: Celebrate beautifully
celebrate.body: Your cake arrives ready to anchor the table and elevate the whole celebration with a premium boutique feel.

testimonials.title: Testimonials That Feel as Sweet as the Cakes
testimonials.subtitle: Real celebrations, soft details, and memorable moments shared by customers who wanted their cake to feel extra special.
testimonials.tagline: Loved for the details and finish

birthday.quote: The cake looked even softer and prettier in person. It felt like it belonged in a boutique cafe window.
birthday.name: Birthday Celebration

wedding.quote: The design was elegant, the details were thoughtful, and it instantly made the whole table feel more special.
wedding.name: Wedding Client

private.quote: Beautiful styling, lovely textures, and a premium finish that made our celebration feel complete.
private.name: Private Event

social.title: A Peek Into the Hapi.Cakes World
social.subtitle: Pastel cake finishes, celebration tables, and sweet details that make the brand feel like a boutique dessert studio.

cta.title: Custom cake in mind?
cta.subtitle: Tell us your mood, colors, and celebration details. We’ll help shape a cake that feels beautiful, personal, and worth remembering.
